bundle.shortDescription: Local-first journaling on top of SQLRite
bundle.longDescription: SQLRite Journal is an example desktop app showcasing what you can build with SQLRite: a markdown daily-notes journal with tag filtering, full-text search powered by SQLRite's Phase 8 BM25 indexes, and a natural-language 'ask my journal' panel backed by the engine's `ask` feature. Your entries live in a single .sqlrite file that you can copy between machines or open in the SQLRite REPL.
